UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores individual user preferences, settings, and overall account information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity, matching the Firebase Authentication user ID (uid).

selectedLanguage.description: The target language the user is currently learning (e.g., 'French').

subscriptionActive.description: True if the user has an active subscription from any source.

subscriptionSource.description: The source of the active subscription.

subscriptionExpiry.description: The date when the user's current subscription expires. Null for lifetime access.

xpPoints.description: Total experience points accumulated by the user. (Legacy, no longer incremented).

currentStreak.description: The number of consecutive days the user has completed at least one lesson.

lastActiveDate.description: The date of the user's last recorded activity.

aiPlanningEnabled.description: A flag indicating if AI plans weekly themes.

languageProgress.description: Stores language-specific learning progress, keyed by language and then by path.

completedDays.description: Array of completed lessons, formatted as 'week-day'.

paymentProviderCustomerId.description: The customer ID from the payment provider (e.g., Stripe, Google Play).

paymentProviderSubscriptionId.description: The active subscription ID from the payment provider.

referralCode.description: A unique code assigned to the user for referring others.

referredBy.description: The referral code of the user who referred this user.

UserWeekProgress.title: UserWeekProgress
UserWeekProgress.description: DEPRECATED: This entity is no longer in active use. User progress is now stored within the UserProfile entity.

daysCompleted.description: An array of day numbers (1-7) that the user has completed.

weekCompleted.description: Flag indicating if all 7 days of the week are complete.

definition.description: Stores individual user preferences and settings.
